title: ハッピーバレンタイン♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh wow.... Rice, it's so glittery here!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this year's Valentine's Fair looks so
magical!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I see chocolate ice cream! And there's
chocolate carrots too! A-amazing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Pick whatever you want, I brought all my
pocket money to spend today!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You're taking this seriously! All righty, let's
eat up a storm!

text_block_list.name: Haru & Rice
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, someone brought this as a snack the
other day. It was pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yukino? Are you not going to pick anything?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I-I am! I am, but...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
It's just, you've already received so many types of
chocolate before, so... I hardly think a gift from
me would matter much...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Do you really feel that way?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's getting a Valentine's gift from someone that's
special, not the gift itself, you know? It's about
making memories.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So, I want chocolates, Yukino, and I want to get
them from you. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! W-well, I also want t'get some chocolate from
you too, City!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So sweet, so delicious... I'm stuffed...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara! Are you getting sleepy already?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Mm-hmm...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well, let's continue this another day. U-um,
e-excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk
text_block_list.text: Hello. Can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Could we get these chocolate carrots
to-go?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Actually, could you wrap them like a gift? Urara
said she still wanted to eat them, so...

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Absolutely. I'll get that ready for you right
away.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara, should I give you a piggyback ride?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeeah... But, what about Valentine's Day?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It's okay. There's still more to come.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Happy Valentine's Day.
